Feature: Deep Audit v2: hx-button-group

## Deep Component Audit — hx-button-group

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-button-group/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 88 (B)
**Known issues:** 'internals' and 'role' properties missing descriptions.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Gap/spacing between buttons. Border radius handling on grouped buttons. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. role="group" with aria-label. Keyboard navigation betwee
